items.name_en: The bucket bag is a signature style for many fashion bloggers, suitable for both commuting and casual wear. Canvas material is structured and durable, creating a more three-dimensional silhouette when worn. It offers ample capacity and an adjustable shoulder strap! Plus, it's very lightweight. As a new member of this series, it's bound to captivate many bag lovers!

items.name_en: Wow wow wow wow wow 👍 Super many compartments, new plaid military backpack is here ✌🏻 With B-shaped zipper pullers, two tightening pockets on the sides for water bottles ✔️ The bag has 4 external pockets 😘 and 2 internal compartments ❤ Wow... holding the textbooks of students, mainly can be sorted and stored separately 👍 convenient 👍 files or laptops, all accommodated 👍 The handle is also designed very well, it doesn't hurt the hand no matter how heavy it is, the handle is padded with comfortable, elegant foam
